evidence.claim: A blood unit has a collection date.
evidence.fact: The application tracks blood units by collection date.
evidence.user_story_span: a blood unit has a collection date
evidence.fact_span: tracks blood units by collection date

evidence.claim: The blood unit is automatically marked as expired.
evidence.fact: It automatically monitors the expiry of blood units and removes outdated ones from circulation.
evidence.user_story_span: the blood unit is automatically marked as expired

evidence.claim: Blood units have a maximum shelf life of 42 days.
evidence.fact: The expiry of a blood unit is fixed at 42 days after collection.
evidence.user_story_span: Blood units have a maximum shelf life of 42 days
evidence.fact_span: expiry of a blood unit is fixed at 42 days
